description: Practical tools and utility items used in fantasy settings.
items: Compass
A magnetic needle in a case that always points north.
Spyglass
A tube of lenses that brings distant things close.
Lantern
A caged flame that lights the way in dark places.
Candle
A pillar of wax with a wick that burns with steady light.
Map
A drawn chart of lands, roads, and hidden places.
Anvil
A heavy iron block where metal is shaped by hammer.
Quill
A feather pen dipped in ink for writing.
Needle
A thin spike of steel for stitching cloth or leather.
Chest
A sturdy box with a lock for storing valuables.
Urn
A sealed vessel for holding ashes or precious substances.
Vial
A small glass tube for carrying liquids or powders.
